title: frankenia laevis var. capitata
intro: Frankenia laevis var. capitata, also known as the shrubby frankenia or coastal frankenia, is a variety of succulent shrub native to the coastal regions of Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Frankenia laevis var. capitata include its ability to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a salve or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
